mapper.select: SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0501_01-02_1#Sql001 */ T9N_INFO_CAT , T9N_NAME , T9N_REQUIRED_FLG FROM PSITE_T9N_INFO_CAT WHERE T9N_DEL_FLAG = '0' ORDER BY T9N_SORT

insert.foreach: INSERT /* @SQLID=SUB0501_01-02_1#Sql003 */ INTO PSITE_T4N_INFO_PRIV( T4N_ID , PRIV_ID , COR_CREATE_DATE , COR_CREATE_BY , COR_UPDATE_DATE , COR_UPDATE_BY ) SELECT NVL(MAX(T4N_ID), 0) , #{ item } , IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE , #{ req.userId } , IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE , #{ req.userId } FROM PSITE_T4N_INFO WHERE COR_CREATE_BY = #{ req.userId }

INSERT /* @SQLID=SUB0501_01-02_1#Sql004 */ INTO PSITE_T5N_INFO_READ( T5N_ID , T5N_INFO_ID , T5N_FA_ID , T5N_READ_FLG , T5N_READ_AT , T5N_LOGIN ) SELECT SEQ_PSITE_T5_INFO_READ.nextval , max_id , NULL , '0' , NULL , #{ item } FROM ( SELECT NVL(MAX(T4N_ID), 0) max_id FROM PSITE_T4N_INFO WHERE COR_CREATE_BY = #{ req.userId } )
